allow: Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('Status:', j.status, '| QR:', j.qr ? 'SIM \('+j.qr.length+' chars\)' : 'NÃO'\);")

PowerShell(Stop-Process -Id 33616 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($procs\) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Host "Processos encerrados")

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Write-Host "Ainda ocupada pelo PID $\($conn.OwningProcess\)" } else { Write-Host "Porta 3000 livre" })

PowerShell($procs = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($procs\) { $procs | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Host "OK")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Status:', d['status'], '| QR:', 'SIM \('+str\(len\(d['qr']\)\)+' chars\)' if d.get\('qr'\) else 'NÃO'\)")
